name: Blob Drop
author: Poki
description: Blob Drop is a fun watermelon game in the popular Suika genre. It's a merge puzzle game where you strategically drop various types of blobs into a cup. Watch as bouncy blobs fall one by one, and when two of the same type meet, they merge into a larger blob! Your goal is to create the biggest blob possible without overflowing the cup. If the cup gets too full and a blob spills over, it's game over! How large can you grow your blob? How to play Blob Drop? Move your blob with the mouse and click to drop it into the cup! Who created Blob Drop? Blob Drop is created by Eray Zesen. Play their other games on Poki: Light the Lamp ! How can I play Blob Drop for free? You can play Blob Drop for free on Poki. Can I play Blob Drop on mobile devices and desktop? Blob Drop can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
